prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低位次分别为8481→7633→8940→12143→15514，整体呈持续后移趋势，近两年后移幅度尤为显著（2024年后移3203名，2025年后移3371 名），2025年基准位次约15514名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划从2021–2023年的9人，2024年增至12人，2025年增至16人，2026年进一步扩至21人，较2 025年扩招31.25%，连续三年大幅扩招，显著降低了录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中师范大学为教育部直属211工程、双一流建设高校，软科2026年中国大学主榜排名第53位，近 年排名稳定在46–58名区间，在师范类院校中位居前列；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于81岁博士毕业等终身学习正面事件；抖音热度排名第89位（一般） ，短视频平台关注度中等，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中教育学获评A+（全国顶尖），中国史、心理学、政治学、马克思主义理论获评 A-，共5个A-及以上学科，教育学为该校王牌，对师范类相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度近年呈分化观望态势，公费师范生政策保 障就业但竞争加剧；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增长约35.4%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争压力显著上升；华中师范大学位于湖北省武汉市，属中部地区，在上海招生占比相对较小；上海考生对本地及东部沿海高校偏好较强，对中部师范类院 校的地域偏好一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招31.25%（使位次数字增大）以及上海考生规模暴增35.4%（使竞争加剧、位次数字减 小），两者作用方向相反但考生增幅略大于扩招幅度，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准15514名基础上继续后移但幅度收窄；预测最低位次约18223名，区间17723–18723名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 中国语言文学类（含汉语言文学（未来卓越教师实验班、非公费师范）、汉语言文学（国家拔尖学生培养基地班）等）
- 历史学类（含历史学（未来卓越教师实验班、非公费师范）、历史学（区域国别实验班））
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学（英才班）、数学与应用数学（未来卓越教师实验班））
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 教育学类（含教育学、融合教育（非公费师范）、特殊教育（非公费师范））
- 物理学（师范类，含未来卓越教师实验班）
- 电子信息类（含智能装备与系统、集成电路设计与集成系统、电子信息科学与技术）
- 经济学（经济学、数学双学士学位项目）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会学类（含社会学（计算社会科学实验班）、社会工作）
- 公共管理类（含行政管理（国家治理实验班）、土地资源管理（数智国土治理实验班））
- 金融学类
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间17723–18723名以内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业可冲刺（尤其中国语言文学类和历史学类），三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（低于 17723名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业如中国语言文学类（国家拔尖学生培养基地班）和历史学类；位次接近区间上限（18723名附近）建议以三档专业为主。华中师范大学教育学A+ 为全国顶尖，但上海招生计划中教育学类属不限选科组，竞争相对缓和，值得关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai were 8481 → 7633 → 8940 → 12143 → 15514, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a particularly significant backward shift in the last two years (a shift of 3203 places in 2024 and 3371 places in 2025). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15514. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shanghai increased from 9 students in 2021–2023 to 12 in 2024, 16 in 2025, and further expanded to 21 in 2026, a 31.25% increase compared to 2025. This marks three consecutive years of significant expansion, significantly lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 53rd, with a stable range of 46–58 in recent years, placing it among the top normal universities. Its reputation in 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to positive lifelong learning events such as a doctoral degree obtained at age 81. Its Douyin popularity ranks 89th (average), indicating moderate attention on short video platforms, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Education was rated A+ (top in the country), while Chinese History, Psychology, Political Science, and Marxist Theory were rated A-, totaling five disciplines rated A- or above. Education is the university's flagship discipline, strongly attracting applicants to normal-related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors has shown a divergent and wait-and-see trend in recent years. The public-funded normal student policy ensures employment but intensifies competition. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Shanghai is approximately 66,700, a significant increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, leading to a sharp rise in competition pressure. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, in the central region, with a relatively small proportion of enrollment in Shanghai. Shanghai examinees have a strong preference for local and eastern coastal universities, with average regional preference for central normal universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 31.25% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (which increases the ranking number), and the 35.4% surge in the number of Shanghai examinees (which intensifies competition and decreases the ranking number), these two factors act in opposite directions, but the increase in examinees is slightly larger than the expansion rate. It is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 15,514, but with a narrowed margin. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18,223, with a range of 17,723–18,723.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature (Future Outstanding Teacher Experimental Class, Non-Public-Funded Normal), Chinese Language and Literature (National Top-Notch Student Training Base Class), etc.)
- History (including History (Future Outstanding Teacher Experimental Class, Non-Public-Funded Normal), History (Regional and Country Experimental Class))
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Elite Class), Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Future Outstanding Teacher Experimental Class))
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Education (including Education, Integrated Education (Non-Public-Funded Normal), Special Education (Non-Public-Funded Normal))
- Physics (Normal, including Future Outstanding Teacher Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (including Intelligent Equipment and Systems, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Economics (Economics, Mathematics Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Sociology (including Sociology (Computational Social Science Experimental Class), Social Work)
- Public Administration (including Administrative Management (National Governance Experimental Class), Land Resource Management (Digital Intelligence Land Governance Experimental Class))
- Finance
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17,723–18,723, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (especially Chinese Language and Literature and History), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 17,723), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors such as Chinese Language and Literature (National Top-Notch Student Training Base Class) and History. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 18,723), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors. Central China Normal University's Education A+ is top in the country, but in the Shanghai enrollment plan, Education falls under the unrestricted subject group, making competition relatively moderate and worth attention.
